# HELP container_cpu_usage_seconds_total Cumulative cpu time consumed in seconds.
# TYPE container_cpu_usage_seconds_total counter
container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/abc123def456",image="myapp:latest",name="myapp"} 345.67
container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/789ghi012jkl",image="postgres:16",name="postgres"} 1234.56
container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/mno345pqr678",image="redis:7-alpine",name="redis"} 89.01
container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{id="/",name=""} 9999.99
container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{id="/system.slice/docker.service",name=""} 5555.55
# HELP container_memory_usage_bytes Current memory usage in bytes, including all memory regardless of when it was accessed.
# TYPE container_memory_usage_bytes gauge
container_memory_usage_bytes{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/abc123def456",image="myapp:latest",name="myapp"} 1.34217728e+08
container_memory_usage_bytes{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/789ghi012jkl",image="postgres:16",name="postgres"} 2.68435456e+08
container_memory_usage_bytes{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/mno345pqr678",image="redis:7-alpine",name="redis"} 1.6777216e+07
container_memory_usage_bytes{id="/",name=""} 3.221225472e+09
# HELP container_spec_memory_limit_bytes Memory limit for the container.
# TYPE container_spec_memory_limit_bytes gauge
container_spec_memory_limit_bytes{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/abc123def456",image="myapp:latest",name="myapp"} 5.36870912e+08
container_spec_memory_limit_bytes{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/789ghi012jkl",image="postgres:16",name="postgres"} 1.073741824e+09
container_spec_memory_limit_bytes{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/mno345pqr678",image="redis:7-alpine",name="redis"} 0
# HELP container_network_receive_bytes_total Cumulative count of bytes received.
# TYPE container_network_receive_bytes_total counter
container_network_receive_bytes_total{id="/docker/abc123def456",interface="eth0",name="myapp"} 5.6789e+06
container_network_receive_bytes_total{id="/docker/789ghi012jkl",interface="eth0",name="postgres"} 1.2345e+07
container_network_receive_bytes_total{id="/docker/mno345pqr678",interface="eth0",name="redis"} 3.456e+05
# HELP container_network_transmit_bytes_total Cumulative count of bytes transmitted.
# TYPE container_network_transmit_bytes_total counter
container_network_transmit_bytes_total{id="/docker/abc123def456",interface="eth0",name="myapp"} 4.5678e+06
container_network_transmit_bytes_total{id="/docker/789ghi012jkl",interface="eth0",name="postgres"} 9.8765e+06
container_network_transmit_bytes_total{id="/docker/mno345pqr678",interface="eth0",name="redis"} 2.345e+05
# HELP container_last_seen Last time a container was seen by the exporter.
# TYPE container_last_seen gauge
container_last_seen{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/abc123def456",image="myapp:latest",name="myapp"} 1.710600000e+09
container_last_seen{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/789ghi012jkl",image="postgres:16",name="postgres"} 1.710600000e+09
container_last_seen{container_label_com_docker_compose_project="myproject",id="/docker/mno345pqr678",image="redis:7-alpine",name="redis"} 1.710600000e+09
